methodology_disclaimer: DISTINCTION SNIPPET: Phase 2 preprocessing keyword match metrics (Confidence, Hallucinations, Trust, consequences) are statistical markers used solely for pre-screening candidates. They represent simple substring counts. In contrast, Phase 3 Research Themes (assigned by Groq llama-3.1-8b-instant) represent semantic, human-aligned categorizations based on full post narratives. Final analysis dashboard and charts MUST use Stage 2 primary/secondary themes only.
